title: Budget Tags — share visibility on a project
what: Tag teammates onto any project budget so it's clear who's working it. Each tagged person shows as a colored first/last-initial icon next to the budget's Status. Setting a Budget Owner automatically tags them, and tags drive the My Projects filter on the pipeline page.
where: ProFi → open any project budget → the header row next to Status (labeled "Tagged").
how: Open the project's budget in ProFi.
In the header row (Budget Dated / Owner / Status), find Tagged and click + Tag.
Pick a name — the list matches the Budget Owner dropdown. Their initials icon appears instantly.
Setting the Budget Owner tags that person automatically — no extra step.
Click an initials icon to remove someone (it asks to confirm).

title: Show My Projects filter on the Finance pipeline
what: One click filters the Project Finance list down to only the budgets you own (Budget Owner) or are tagged on — no more scrolling everyone else's projects.
where: ProFi → Project Finance page → top right, next to + New Project.
how: Open Project Finance from the hub.
Click Show My Projects (top right) — the button turns blue "✓ My Projects" and the list filters to yours.
It works together with the RFP / Live / Archive folders.
Click it again to see everything.

title: Hub: Project View / Operations View toggle
what: The hub now has two modes. Project View lists every project as a tile, organized by project code, with search. Operations View shows the three apps (ProFi, FreePro, AvocadoPost). Team Management stays as a full-width bar below both views. The hub remembers which view you used last.
where: The hub (home page) — the toggle sits centered under "Where to today?".
how: Sign in — the hub opens in the view you used last.
Click 🗂 Project View to browse all projects by code (use the search box for code, title, or client).
Click ⚙ Operations View to jump into ProFi, FreePro, or AvocadoPost directly.
Team Management is always available in the elongated blue tile below.

title: Project Workspace — Finance, Pre-Production & Post in one view
what: Opening a project from Project View lands in a single workspace where you flip between the full ProFi budget, the FreePro production page, and the AvocadoPost project page. These are the real pages, not copies — any change made here (budget lines, schedules, edits) is instantly the same everywhere.
where: Hub → Project View → click any project tile.
how: From the hub's Project View, click a project tile.
Use the Project Finance | Pre-Production | Post-Production toggle at the top right to flip sections.
If a budget has multiple productions, a shoot-code dropdown appears on the Pre-Production tab.
The Post-Production tab creates the project's Avo page automatically the first time you open it.
‹ All Projects returns to the project list.
